Three days feels so close that my heart is already getting dressed for the celebration ❤️
Only a few sunrises left before your day, princess. I hope you can feel me cheering for you from here.
If I were there, I would probably be pretending to act normal while secretly planning little surprises.
The closer your birthday gets, the louder my heart gets. It keeps saying: celebrate her well.
Tiny warning: I am becoming emotionally dramatic about your birthday, and I regret nothing.
I keep imagining your smile when midnight arrives. That thought alone is making my whole day softer.
አንቺን ማክበር የልቤ ደስታ ነው። በቅርቡ የአንቺ ቀን ይመጣል። እናትዬ እወድሻለሁ እሽ ቅዱስ ገብርኤል የሰጠኝ ስጦታዬ ነሽ
